content.text: Raise maxAttempts in the retry policy from 3 to 5.

input.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: src/net/retryPolicy.js
@@ export const retryPolicy = {
   enabled: true,
-  maxAttempts: 3,
+  maxAttempts: 5,
   baseDelayMs: 200,
   maxDelayMs: 5000,
   jitter: true,
   jitterFactor: 0.3,
   retryOn: [408, 425, 429, 500, 502, 503, 504],
   respectRetryAfter: true,
   timeoutMs: 10000,
   circuitBreaker: false,
*** End Patch

content.content:
Successfully applied patch to the following files:
src/net/retryPolicy.js
